title: How Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian are adopting AI coding
summary: Jordan Topoleski moderates a panel with engineering leaders from Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian discussing how they adopted AI coding tools at scale. The discussion covers workflow changes, productivity measurement, and best practices for transitioning to AI-assisted development.
